title: Boris Godunov
writer: Modest Mussorgsky, Alexander Pushkin, Vera Stroyeva
actors: Aleksandr Pirogov, Nikandr Khanayev, Georgi Nelepp
plot: Action happens at the end of the 16th century, on the eve of "time of troubles". The main character of this historical tragedy - the Russian tsar Boris Godunov who has ascended to a throne after Ivan the Terrible after tragic even...
